articles.description: Trace the jazz legend’s explosive relationship with music through a children’s book, a graphic novel, an artist’s account and more.

articles.title: 'Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu' movie review: A space Western worth watching
articles.description: Pedro Pascal: The Mandalorian and Grogu brings the Star Wars duo to cinemas with slick action creature battles and space Western charm. Jon Favreau’s film balances humour and nostalgia, though uneven pacing and predictable twists hold it back too.

articles.title: Prabhas 'Constantly Juggling' Fauzi, Spirit; Adds Another Biggie To His Already Packed 2027 Line-Up - Deets Inside
articles.description: Prabhas is currently balancing multiple big-budget films, including Fauzi and Spirit, while also preparing for another ambitious project. With back-to-back shoots and intense preparations underway, the actor has a packed schedule.

articles.title: Sehaj Rrajput remembers breaking down while shooting the domestic violence track for Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
articles.description: In the gripping storyline of Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile, Sehaj Rrajput brings to life Unnati, a woman standing up against the harrowing tides of domestic abuse. Her journey for justice against her husband is not only heart-wrenching but also a testament to her unwavering spirit.

articles.title: Kangana Ranaut Reacts to Wedding Buzz After Viral Mangalsutra Video; Here’s What She Said
articles.description: MP Kangana Ranaut’s new pictures wearing a mangalsutra and green bangles sparked wedding rumours online. However, she clarified it’s her film look as a housewife role and assured she will announce her real marriage herself.

articles.title: New OTT Releases (May 22 – May 24, 2026): What To Watch This Week?
articles.description: From courtroom drama, supernatural thrillers to romance, action-packed thrillers, this week’s OTT slate offers something for every kind of viewers.

articles.title: Suriya's Karuppu Becomes First Tamil Film In 9 Months To Cross Rs 100 Crore Mark
articles.description: Karuppu starring Suriya and Trisha Krishnan becomes 2026s first Tamil film to cross Rs 100 crore, reviving Kollywood box office and grossing Rs 175.17 crore worldwide.

articles.title: ‘People look at me as if I have come from another dimension’: Ravi Kishan on going viral for his ‘home from work’ statement
articles.description: Ravi Kishan addressed his viral 'home from work' comment. He explained it was a human error during a media interaction for his upcoming film Maa Behen. Kishan admitted he often trends on social media for verbal mishaps. He was on his way to Parliament when the slip occurred. The actor-politician stated that making mistakes is human.

articles.title: Hear, there, everywhere: How Miles Davis left his mark on the Global South
articles.description: He provided inspiration, yes, but something else too – permission, in a post-colonial world, to interpret jazz through the lens of local culture and artistry.

articles.title: Peddi | Kannada Song - Hellallallo (Promo)
articles.description: Watch the song 'Hellallallo' from Kannada movie 'Peddi' starring Ram Charan, Janhvi Kapoor and Shruthi Haasan. 'Hellallallo' is sung by Rakshita Suresh and music of the song is given by A R Rahman. Lyrics of 'Peddi' song 'Hellallallo' are written by Varadaraj Chikkaballapura. To know more about 'Hellallallo' song from Ram Charan, Janhvi Kapoor and Shruthi Haasan starrer 'Peddi' watch the video.

articles.title: Mel Gibson reveals first look at ‘The Resurrection of the Christ’
articles.description: In a momentous celebration of faith and storytelling, Mel Gibson's two-part biblical epic, 'The Resurrection of the Christ,' wrapped up filming in Italy, marking a milestone in cinematic history. Following in the steps of 'The Passion of the Christ,' these films are scheduled for release on May 6, 2027, and May 25, 2028.

articles.title: "I hate Michael Jackson", says Ram Gopal Varma, reveals he ‘backstabbed’ him
articles.description: Ram Gopal Varma shared an emotional tribute to Michael Jackson, recalling how the pop legend inspired his creativity while admitting Jackson’s death shattered his lifelong fantasy of the superstar being superhuman.

articles.title: Kamal Haasan explains why we must conserve energy amid West Asia conflict: ‘Shastri ji asked citizens to skip one meal’
articles.description: Tamil star and Rajya Sabha MP Kamal Haasan urged the country to do its bit amid the conflict between US-Israel and Iran. Here's what he said.

articles.title: Palak Tiwari Calls Deepika Padukone Her Biggest Inspiration, Praises Her Journey
articles.description: Palak Tiwari has expressed her admiration for Deepika Padukone, calling her a major inspiration for young actors. She praised Deepika’s powerful yet feminine screen presence and the impactful journey she has built in cinema.

articles.title: Rajesh Khanna’s granddaughter Naomika Saran and Vedang Raina spark dating buzz during public outing- Watch
articles.description: Naomika Saran and Vedang Raina’s recent public appearance has reignited dating speculation with fans closely watching their chemistry and viral moments online.

articles.title: Venezuelan model, beauty queen Andrea del Val accuses celebrity stylist of assault in disturbing Cannes hotel video
articles.description: Beauty queen Andrea del Val has accused celebrity stylist Giovanni Laguna of an attack during the Cannes Film Festival. A viral video shows del Val with visible injuries, claiming Laguna assaulted her. Hotel guests reportedly alerted authorities, leading to Laguna's detention for questioning. The incident has sparked widespread online discussion.

articles.title: 40kg gold, Burj Khalifa home, party yacht: Inside life of Desi Bling’s school dropout-turned-billionaire Satish Sanpal
articles.description: Desi Bling follows the lives of Indians who arrived in Dubai with almost nothing in their pockets, only to eventually build staggering wealth for themselves.

articles.title: Song lyric of the day by R.E.M: ‘When your day is long, And the night, the night is yours alone..' ; what Everybody Hurts teaches us about healing
articles.description: R.E.M.'s iconic song "Everybody Hurts" offers solace to those struggling with depression and feelings of inadequacy. Released decades ago, the track's powerful lyrics remind listeners that experiencing sadness is human and encourage seeking comfort in friends and loved ones, emphasizing that no one is truly alone in their struggles.

articles.title: Raj Babbar had another affair after Smita Patil's death, reveals Arya Babbar: 'Which child would like hearing that?'
articles.description: Actor Aarya Babbar candidly discussed his father Raj Babbar's past relationship with Smita Patil, stating the family has moved on from the chapter that once caused pain. Despite public attention remaining fixed on this aspect, Aarya emphasized that everyone involved has progressed, and he no longer harbors resentment.

articles.title: 7 things children remember about their parents forever
articles.description: Years later, children often grow up to remember not the grand gestures, but the small, repeated moments that shaped how safe, worthy, and seen they felt. These memories do not fade easily because they become part of a child’s inner blueprint for trust, love, and self-respect. Here are seven things children remember about their parents forever.

articles.title: Zubeen death case: Gauhati HC to hear Shyamkanu Mahanta’s Bail plea
articles.description: Shyamkanu Mahanta's bail plea in Assamese singer Zubeen Garg's death case will be heard by the Gauhati High Court on Friday. This follows a previous hearing where additional affidavits were submitted. Mahanta has been in custody for months, implicated in a case the Assam CM termed a "plain and simple murder," despite Singapore police finding no foul play.

Gigi Hadid's New York apartment is all about a millennial's rustic and boho in modernity: 5 artsy inspirations to steal
articles.description: A person’s home is a true reflection of who they are. While some places are unarranged and raw, other curated corners of the home bring life to the walls with utter creativity and nuance.Gigi Hadid’s New York apartment is also one of a kind, with the right balance of the artistic bohemian in a millennial’s household. It looks deeply personal, creative, and fearless. Instead of following a minimal or overly luxurious style, the model chose interiors that symbolise comfort, her character, individuality, and artistic freedom. Her home combines bold décor with sentimental objects, playful showpieces, and vintage-inspired artistic objects that make every corner feel lived in and expressive.Here are a few art inspirations that you can take away

articles.title: Ricky Martin safe after tear gas scare at Montenegro concert; Singer returns to stage and continues show
articles.description: Ricky Martin's concert in Montenegro was briefly halted when a fan discharged tear gas. The singer and his team safely left the stage, but Martin later returned to fulfill his commitment to fans after authorities deemed the situation under control. The tour will continue as planned.

articles.title: Nick Jonas reveals real-life boy band experience helped him shape 'Power Ballad' character
articles.description: Singer-actor Nick Jonas says his personal experience as a member of the Jonas Brothers helped him portray his latest character in the upcoming musical comedy 'Power Ballad', according to People.

articles.title: Britney handcuffed by police in dashcam footage - WATCH
articles.description: Newly surfaced dashcam footage captures Britney Spears' March DUI arrest, showing her interaction with officers after being pulled over for erratic driving. Despite admitting to a mimosa and taking medication, she later registered below the legal limit. Spears reached a plea deal, reducing the charge to 'wet reckless' and receiving probation.

articles.title: "Everyone hates him": Why analysts say Travis Kelce could be the most polarising TV personality since retiring from NFL
articles.description: Travis Kelce remains at the center of sports and entertainment conversations as his media future gains momentum through the highly successful “New Heights” podcast and a major Amazon deal. While analysts see him as a strong fit for broadcasting, fan reactions online remain sharply split between criticism and strong support. Beyond media speculation, Kelce also drew attention for a personal moment shared on his podcast with Rory McIlroy, where the emotional meaning of weddings was discussed.

articles.title: Why Rs 40 LPA earners don’t feel richer than Rs 20 LPA earners. CA explains the hidden reason
articles.description: High salaries do not always bring financial peace. Chartered Accountant Nitin Kaushik explains how lifestyle inflation traps urban professionals. Expenses rise with income, creating debt. Social media fuels comparison spending. Many buy things they do not need with borrowed money. True wealth is the gap between earnings and spending, not just salary figures.

articles.title: Who is Phyllis Gilliam? Georgie & Mandy’s First Marriage honors costume supervisor who died months after losing husband to cancer
articles.description: Phyllis Gilliam: Fans of Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage learned of Phyllis Gilliam's passing. She was a costume supervisor for the show. Gilliam's tribute appeared in the Season 2 finale. Her career spanned over three decades. She worked on many productions. Gilliam passed away on March 23, 2026. Her obituary detailed her life and career.

articles.title: Fact check: Is Michael B. Jordan dating Khloé Kardashian? Truth behind viral photos
articles.description: AI-generated photos falsely showed Michael B. Jordan and Khloé Kardashian on a date; the viral images were fake edits.

articles.description: Chand Mera Dil belongs to Ananya Panday and Lakshya's palpable chemistry and the maturity they bring to the screenplay. Sachin-Jigar’s tunes form the beating heart of the story.

articles.description: Mega 158 starring Chiranjeevi has been officially launched. Now director Bobby Kolli has dropped major hint on Megastar's character in the much-talked about film.

articles.title: Horoscope Today: Astrological Predictions on May 22, 2026, For All Zodiac Signs
articles.description: Each zodiac sign has it's unique traits that shape their personalities & differentiate them from each other. Wouldn’t it be useful to start your day knowing what’s universe planned for you? Keep reading to see if today will bring good fortune your way.

articles.title: Gisele Bundchen and Tom Brady back in spotlight after viral Gucci runway debut sparks frenzy
articles.description: Tom Brady surprised fans after making a bold runway debut at Gucci’s New York fashion show alongside major celebrities. The viral appearance quickly caught the attention of his ex-wife, Gisele Bundchen, who reportedly found the moment “fun to watch.” While Bundchen has moved on with her private life and marriage to Joaquim Valente, Brady continues drawing headlines through fashion appearances and ongoing dating rumors involving stars like Alix Earle, Irina Shayk, Sofia Vergara, and Kim Kardashian.

articles.title: "You're inviting people to.....": Divorce lawyer warns Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini to stay silent amid affair rumors
articles.description: Celebrity divorce lawyer James Sexton sparked online debate after sharing blunt advice about handling public scandals, with many linking his comments to ongoing rumors involving Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini. Sexton warned that early public statements during a PR crisis can create lasting damage and make controversies worse. While no allegations have been confirmed, social media speculation continues growing. The discussion also drew comparisons to the intense public scrutiny surrounding Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift’s highly watched relationship and ongoing wedding rumors.

articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding overshadowed by explosive blackmail claims tied to Blake Lively lawsuit
articles.description: Taylor Swift has been pulled into fresh online controversy after viral rumors linked her to Blake Lively’s ongoing legal dispute with Justin Baldoni. Unverified claims and alleged leaked texts fueled blackmail speculation across social media. The drama comes as fans continue discussing Swift’s future with Travis Kelce and possible wedding plans. While no court documents confirm the allegations, the internet frenzy has intensified attention around Swift’s friendships, public image, and highly watched relationship with the Kansas City Chiefs star.

articles.title: Actress and former beauty pageant winner who started acting at 17, left films to pursue PhD. Now, Swaroop Sampat blames Dhurandhar director Aditya Dhar for grey hair
articles.description: Swaroop Sampat Rawal recently shared a humorous anecdote about director Aditya Dhar. She playfully blames him for her grey hair now and also praises Dhurandhar filmmaker's directorial style. Meanwhile, she is returning to the stage after 25 years in a new play.

articles.title: Arya on Raj Babbar-Smita Patil affair, Prateik's rift with family
articles.description: Actor-comedian Arya Babbar opened up about the Babbar family’s complicated history in a recent interview. Speaking about his father Raj Babbar’s relationship with late actress Smita Patil and his strained bond with half-brother Prateik Smita Patil, Arya shared emotional memories, painful truths and his family’s efforts to move forward with dignity.

articles.title: 'Emily in Paris' to end after Season 6 - WATCH
articles.description: Get ready for the final chapter of 'Emily in Paris'! Season 6 marks the end of Emily's Parisian adventure, with filming currently underway in Greece. Creator Darren Star expressed gratitude to fans for the journey. Lead Lily Collins promises a spectacular farewell season, packed with the charm and drama viewers love.

articles.title: Kyle Busch's last Instagram post was proper tribute to wife Samantha, kids: ‘So proud today...’
articles.description: Kyle Busch was a proper family man and his last social media post is just evidence to that

articles.title: Alex Rodriguez reportedly single again as Jaclyn Cordeiro finally breaks silence on their three year relationship status
articles.description: Alex Rodriguez and Jaclyn Cordeiro have reportedly ended their relationship after three years together, according to TMZ. Cordeiro later confirmed they are “taking some time apart” but said there is still mutual respect and support between them. The news surfaced shortly after Rodriguez celebrated his daughter Ella’s graduation with family members, including ex-wife Cynthia Scurtis.

articles.title: ‘Is That A Face Mask?’ Retired Admiral Robert Harward Goes Viral After Fox News Appearance
articles.description: Retired Vice Admiral Robert Harward sparked viral online speculation after appearing on Fox News to discuss the US-Iran standoff. Social media users focused on his appearance during the interview, fueling unverified “mask” theories and renewed interest in his background.
